payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current, non-superseded memory for Sam from Goldman. mem_old matched the same general subject but was filtered out because it has been superseded by mem_new and should not be presented as current.
payload.decision: Return mem_new as the current applicable memory and exclude mem_old because its validity is superseded by mem_new.

entity_resolution.reason: The query context identifies Sam by the disambiguating affiliation 'from Goldman'; no durable entity ID was provided in the fixture.

details: Explained that mem_new was selected as current.

repair_options: If mem_old was incorrectly marked superseded, remove or revise the supersession link.
If both memories are valid for different time periods, add temporal qualifiers so recall can return the appropriate version.
